title: Sona Potiriyaputta
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
contentHtml: It's not for sleeping, the night garlanded with zodiac stars. The night, for one who knows, is for staying awake. If I were to fall from my elephant's shoulder, and a tusker trampled me, death in battle would be better for me, than that I, defeated, survive.
summary: Better to die in battle than to survive, defeated.
